basic_details.job_title: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 30 Systems Engineer (ITS) Posts via GATE Score
basic_details.short_information: Indian Highways Management Company Limited (IHMCL) is a company jointly promoted by the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) along with its Concessionaires and Financial Institutions, incorporated under the Companies Act, 1956. IHMCL was established to implement and manage an efficient Electronic Toll Collection (ETC) system across national highways and to deploy Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS) for better highway management and traffic conditions. IHMCL is a non-government company that has adopted the IDA pay pattern.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not specify any application fee details for this recruitment.

age_limit.details: The age of applicants must not be less than 21 years and not exceeding 30 years as on the last date of receipt of online applications. The crucial date for determining eligibility is the last date prescribed for receipt of online applications.

qualification.details: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering in Information Technology, Computer Science, Electronics and Communications, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a combination of any of the above engineering branches from a recognized University/Institute. | Candidates who are in the final year of their Engineering Degree programme and are yet to receive their final results may also apply, provided they fulfil all other eligibility criteria. Such candidates must submit proof of having passed the qualifying examination in the form of a Degree Certificate or Provisional Certificate issued by the University/Institute by 31 August 2026, failing which their candidature will be cancelled. | Recruitment is by direct recruitment through a valid Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE) Score in Computer Science and Information Technology (CS), Electronics and Communications Engineering (EC), or Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (DA) discipline. | The age of applicants must not be less than 21 years and not exceeding 30 years as on the last date of receipt of online applications. The crucial date for determining eligibility is the last date prescribed for receipt of online applications. | All the above concessions are concurrent - if a candidate is eligible for more than one concession, only the concession with the highest permissible limit will be granted. Age relaxation for ex-servicemen is subject to the conditions that continuous service rendered is not less than six months after attestation, and the resultant age after deduction does not exceed the prescribed age limit by more than three years, as per DoPT OM No. 15012/2/2010-Estt.(D) dated 27 March 2012.

salary_details.details: The post of Systems Engineer (ITS) carries an E-2 Grade pay scale of Rs. 50,000 – Rs. 1,60,000 under the IDA pattern. The indicative monthly salary at the starting Basic Pay of ₹50,000 in E-2 IDA Grade would be approximately ₹1,00,000, which includes Dearness Allowance, Cafeteria Allowance, and House Rent Allowance in X Class Cities. This indicative figure excludes statutory deductions such as EPF contribution and Income Tax.

selection_process: Selection for the post of Systems Engineer (ITS) is based on the following criteria:
Merit is determined on the basis of the valid GATE Score of the year 2025. IHMCL reserves the right to invite candidates for interview as per a cut-off for the respective category
to be decided subsequently by IHMCL. If the number of applications received is large
IHMCL will adopt a shortlisting criterion to restrict the number of candidates called for interaction/interview to a reasonable number
by a method decided by the Selection Committee. For the final merit list
if two or more candidates in the same category have equal scores/marks
the candidate older in age will be placed higher in the merit list.
Note: Candidates must enter their GATE Score as mentioned in the official GATE 2025 Scorecard (range: 0 to 1000) while applying.
how_to_apply: Visit the official IHMCL website: http://www.ihmcl.co.in (best viewed on Google Chrome or Mozilla Firefox).
Click on the "Careers" tab, then "New Openings".
Click on the relevant recruitment advertisement, then click "Online application".
Follow the on-screen instructions and fill up the application form with the requisite information.
Upload all required documents: photograph, signature, Class X certificate, caste/category certificate (if applicable), Engineering degree passing certificate, and GATE Score Card 2025.
Use the "Edit" option if any correction is needed, or click the final "Submit" button once satisfied.
Upon submission, a Unique Reference Number along with an "Application Acknowledgement" will be generated automatically and sent to the registered email address.
Keep a copy of the Application Acknowledgement safely for future submission to IHMCL along with supporting documents.
Applications must be submitted online by 2 August 2026 (6:00 PM). Applications received through any mode other than online will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected.
important_instructions: Reservation benefit under community categories is available only if the candidate's caste is included in the list of reserved communities issued by the Central Government. OBC candidates must submit an OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) certificate issued during the year 2026-2027, clearly indicating that the candidate does not belong to the creamy layer. EWS candidates must meet the criteria issued by the Central Government and possess an Income & Asset Certificate based on income for Financial Year 2025-2026, issued after 1 April 2026. Candidates seeking reservation as SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS must submit a certificate in the prescribed proforma only, from the designated authority, with the caste/community name and spelling exactly matching the central government's notified lists. No change in the community status already indicated in the online application will be allowed. Candidates who fail to submit valid Caste/Category certificates will not be considered for reservation; if otherwise eligible under Unreserved (UR) criteria, their candidature will be considered against the UR vacancy only. SC/ST/Minority Community/Women/Persons with Benchmark Disabilities are encouraged to apply.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Overview
content_sections.text: Indian Highways Management Company Limited (IHMCL) is a company jointly promoted by the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) along with its Concessionaires and Financial Institutions, incorporated under the Companies Act, 1956. IHMCL was established to implement and manage an efficient Electronic Toll Collection (ETC) system across national highways and to deploy Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS) for better highway management and traffic conditions. IHMCL is a non-government company that has adopted the IDA pay pattern.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The number of posts may increase or decrease as per the requirement of IHMCL.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering in Information Technology, Computer Science, Electronics and Communications, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a combination of any of the above engineering branches from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates who are in the final year of their Engineering Degree programme and are yet to receive their final results may also apply, provided they fulfil all other eligibility criteria. Such candidates must submit proof of having passed the qualifying examination in the form of a Degree Certificate or Provisional Certificate issued by the University/Institute by 31 August 2026, failing which their candidature will be cancelled. Recruitment is by direct recruitment through a valid Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE) Score in Computer Science and Information Technology (CS), Electronics and Communications Engineering (EC), or Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (DA) discipline. The age of applicants must not be less than 21 years and not exceeding 30 years as on the last date of receipt of online applications. The crucial date for determining eligibility is the last date prescribed for receipt of online applications. All the above concessions are concurrent - if a candidate is eligible for more than one concession, only the concession with the highest permissible limit will be granted. Age relaxation for ex-servicemen is subject to the conditions that continuous service rendered is not less than six months after attestation, and the resultant age after deduction does not exceed the prescribed age limit by more than three years, as per DoPT OM No. 15012/2/2010-Estt.(D) dated 27 March 2012.

rows.category: Candidates with 3 years continuous service in Central Govt. (same or allied cadres)

rows.age_relaxation: Period of Military Service plus 3 years

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The post of Systems Engineer (ITS) carries an E-2 Grade pay scale of Rs. 50,000 – Rs. 1,60,000 under the IDA pattern. The indicative monthly salary at the starting Basic Pay of ₹50,000 in E-2 IDA Grade would be approximately ₹1,00,000, which includes Dearness Allowance, Cafeteria Allowance, and House Rent Allowance in X Class Cities. This indicative figure excludes statutory deductions such as EPF contribution and Income Tax.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not specify any application fee details for this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the post of Systems Engineer (ITS) is based on the following criteria: Merit is determined on the basis of the valid GATE Score of the year 2025. IHMCL reserves the right to invite candidates for interview as per a cut-off for the respective category, to be decided subsequently by IHMCL. If the number of applications received is large, IHMCL will adopt a shortlisting criterion to restrict the number of candidates called for interaction/interview to a reasonable number, by a method decided by the Selection Committee. For the final merit list, if two or more candidates in the same category have equal scores/marks, the candidate older in age will be placed higher in the merit list. Note: Candidates must enter their GATE Score as mentioned in the official GATE 2025 Scorecard (range: 0 to 1000) while applying.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Reservation Guidelines
content_sections.text: Reservation benefit under community categories is available only if the candidate's caste is included in the list of reserved communities issued by the Central Government. OBC candidates must submit an OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) certificate issued during the year 2026-2027, clearly indicating that the candidate does not belong to the creamy layer. EWS candidates must meet the criteria issued by the Central Government and possess an Income & Asset Certificate based on income for Financial Year 2025-2026, issued after 1 April 2026. Candidates seeking reservation as SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS must submit a certificate in the prescribed proforma only, from the designated authority, with the caste/community name and spelling exactly matching the central government's notified lists. No change in the community status already indicated in the online application will be allowed. Candidates who fail to submit valid Caste/Category certificates will not be considered for reservation; if otherwise eligible under Unreserved (UR) criteria, their candidature will be considered against the UR vacancy only. SC/ST/Minority Community/Women/Persons with Benchmark Disabilities are encouraged to apply.

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must enter the GATE Score exactly as mentioned in their official GATE 2025 Scorecard, within the range of 0 to 1000.

rows.document: Class X Certificate (indicating date of birth)
Certificate of passing Engineering Degree in relevant discipline

content_sections.heading: IHMCL Recruitment 2026: How to Apply Online
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online by 2 August 2026 (6:00 PM). Applications received through any mode other than online will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: IHMCL Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive by Indian Highways Management Company Limited for 30 posts of Systems Engineer (ITS) in the E-2 Grade, based on valid GATE Score 2025.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration opened on 4 July 2026 at 10:00 AM, and the last date for submission of the online application is 2 August 2026 at 6:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary of Systems Engineer (ITS) in IHMCL?
faq.answer: The post carries an E-2 Grade pay scale of Rs. 50,000 – Rs. 1,60,000 under the IDA pattern. The indicative monthly salary at the starting Basic Pay would be approximately ₹1,00,000, including Dearness Allowance, Cafeteria Allowance, and House Rent Allowance in X Class Cities, excluding statutory deductions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for IHMCL Systems Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering in Information Technology, Computer Science, Electronics and Communications, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a combination of these branches, from a recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q5. Is GATE score mandatory for IHMCL Systems Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, selection is based on the candidate's valid GATE Score 2025 in CS, EC, or DA discipline. Candidates must enter their GATE Score exactly as per their official GATE 2025 Scorecard, in the range 0 to 1000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IHMCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not less than 21 years and not exceeding 30 years as on the last date of receipt of online applications, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories, ex-servicemen, and persons with disabilities.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IHMCL Systems Engineer post?
faq.answer: Selection is based on merit of the valid GATE Score 2025, with IHMCL reserving the right to call candidates for interview as per category-wise cut-offs decided subsequently.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a service bond for IHMCL selected candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, all selected candidates must execute a Service Bond of Rs. 3.00 lakh at the time of joining, for serving IHMCL for a minimum period of 3 years from the date of joining.
